text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hear a familiar voice while on a walk...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Somebody help me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go running toward the source, only to find Taiki
Shuttle in the school field tugging at some vines.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Urk... Trainer! Help me out here!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The director asked me to harvest these here
pumpkins!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's right! My hometown's famous for our
pumpkin festival!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's got stuff like a biggest pumpkin contest and a
race where ya gotta lug a pumpkin with you when
ya run!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention singin' and dancin' under the
stars! It's real exciting!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Once I heard the word "pumpkin," there was no
way I couldn't help!
choice_data_list: Time to put that experience to good use!
Time to put that experience to good use!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But now that I think about it... I've never actually
harvested a pumpkin before.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Even though I never missed a festival... Haha.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What I'm tryin' to say is... ya gotta help me out,
Trainer!
choice_data_list: I'll show you how it's done.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: A competition? You mean...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You wanna see who can harvest 'em the fastest?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That sounds awful fun! I got this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racing to see who can harvest the most
pumpkins, Taiki Shuttle and I have a fun time
clearing the whole field.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I end up helping Taiki Shuttle with the
pumpkin harvesting.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now it makes sense! You gotta clear a gap so
ya can get on in there, right?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ya know, I just might be able to put this to use
when I run too! Let's go try it out in training!
choice_data_list: After we finish harvesting all these.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We both get covered in mud harvesting the
pumpkins, but at least it seems she might have
learned something.
